scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix worker run lint
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix worker run build
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test

DB.description: Cloudflare D1 database for storing all monitor data

JWT_SECRET.description: 后台登录会话签名密钥。建议使用至少 32 个字符的随机字符串。
